query:
SELECT 
  t.id,
  t.userId,
  t.name,
  t.phone,
  t.teacherAttribute,
  t.status,
  LEFT(t.notes, 30) as notes_preview,
  DATE(t.createdAt) as createdDate
FROM teachers t
LEFT JOIN users u ON t.userId = u.id AND u.roles LIKE '%teacher%' AND u.deletedAt IS NULL
WHERE u.id IS NULL
ORDER BY t.createdAt DESC;
